_comment: BT-chart verified production targets for Cherry Ave February 2026. Values sourced from eSTREAM BT dashed reference lines. Calibrated by MDH 2026-03-16.

transformers.notes: Air chiller powers down to near-zero overnight. BT target = mean(kVA > 500 kVA) on weekdays.
Main facility transformer — refrigeration never fully stops. BT target = mean(kVA > 1300 kVA) on weekdays.
Fillet processing transformer — cycles between off and full production. BT target = mean(kVA > 1300 kVA) on weekdays.
Compressor bank — elevated base load with production cycling. BT target = mean(kVA > 1250 kVA) on weekdays.
